_docs: Edit 'audio_reference_suffixes' to add/remove patterns that identify a PDF as a reference for audio proofreading. All other PDFs go to doc-parser. Patterns match against the filename (without extension), case-insensitive. Prefix '_' patterns are suffix matches. Full-word patterns match anywhere in the name.
_note_on_matching: A file named 'L1_slides.pdf' matches '_slides', so it goes to audio-transcriber as reference. A file named '論文_心理學.pdf' has no matching suffix, so it goes to doc-parser for full parsing.
